summary: Frontend testing of Admin Orders page upgrade - All features working correctly. Expandable dropdown UI with smooth animations, quantity badges, customer details highlighting, and status update functionality all verified.
seed_data_creation: 6 existing orders in database used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Orders page fully functional. Uses framer-motion AnimatePresence for smooth expand/collapse animations. Data-testid patterns: order-toggle-{id}, order-details-{id}, item-qty-{id}-{idx}, order-mobile-{id}, order-address-{id}, status-select-{id}. Status update API PUT /api/admin/orders/:id?status=value working correctly.

admin_orders_page_loads.details: Page loads at /admin/orders with 'Manage Orders' heading

collapsed_rows_info.details: Shows Order ID (#EA3A89D6 format), Customer Name, Total Amount (₹ symbol), Status Badge (PENDING/CANCELLED/PROCESSING), Payment Method (COD)

chevron_toggle.details: Chevron arrow icon rotates on expand/collapse

single_order_expanded.details: Only one order expanded at a time - clicking another collapses the previous

expanded_customer_details.details: Shows customer name, email, mobile (highlighted in box with phone icon)

expanded_delivery_address.details: Shows full address with street, taluka, city, state, pincode

expanded_order_items.details: Shows cake name with quantity badge (x2), weight, flavor, delivery date, price

expanded_payment_info.details: Shows payment method (COD), payment status (Pending), total amount

status_dropdown_update.details: Status dropdown updates order status via API, shows success toast 'Order status updated'

smooth_animation.details: framer-motion AnimatePresence provides smooth expand/collapse animation

card_style_layout.details: Clean Shopify-style cards with 12px border radius, white background, proper spacing
